scripts.dev:ui: bun run build:shared && bun --cwd packages/ui dev
scripts.dev:server: bun run build:shared && bun --cwd packages/server dev
scripts.dev:electron: bun run build:shared && bun --cwd packages/electron dev
scripts.dev:standalone: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:ui
scripts.build: bun --cwd packages/contracts build && bun --cwd packages/shared-runtime build && bun --cwd packages/shared build && bun --cwd packages/server build && bun --cwd packages/ui build && bun --cwd packages/electron build
scripts.build:shared: bun --cwd packages/contracts build && bun --cwd packages/shared-runtime build && bun --cwd packages/shared build
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:shared && bun --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun --cwd packages/shared-runtime typecheck && bun --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun --cwd packages/ui typecheck && bun --cwd packages/electron typecheck && bun --cwd packages/extensions/template-mcp typecheck
scripts.test: bun run build:shared && bun run test:contracts && bun run test:shared-runtime && bun run test:shared && bun run test:server && bun run test:ui
